title: tsuga canadensis var. sargentii
intro: Tsuga canadensis var. sargentii, also known as Sargent's hemlock or Eastern hemlock, is a variant of the Eastern hemlock tree that is native to eastern North America. It is a coniferous evergreen tree that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Tsuga canadensis var. sargentii include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be made from its needles and bark.
